name: Microwave Doggie Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flour in a bowl, add egg and broth, mix well.
2. Blend in oatmeal and garlic powder.
3. Roll dough into a ball, roll out on a lightly floured surface to 1/2 inch thick.
4. Cut with small doughnut cutters. Reroll scraps and repeat.
5. Arrange on a shallow baking dish or on a sheet of parchment paper in a single layer.
6. Cook on HIGH for 10 minutes or until firm.
7. Let cool until hardened.
8. Store in covered container in refrigerator.
